source: Generated by scripts/release/generate-public-url-evidence.mjs from local no-secret proof booleans; raw secrets, copied page bodies, raw headers, and sensitive user/financial data keys are rejected before writing

reachability.note: This evidence records only URL reachability booleans. It does not store copied page bodies, logs, headers containing identifiers, or user payloads.

headers.note: This evidence records only security/header presence booleans. It does not store raw request or response headers.

content.note: This evidence records only public content review booleans. It does not store raw financial, personal, token, or copied page payload data.

nextEvidenceRequired: CSP header proof for public app/legal pages
Privacy and ads-safe header proof for public pages
No accidental noindex proof for public store-review URLs
Store review URL proof for landing, privacy, support, and terms
Public page sensitive data non-exposure proof
